reason: Captured Feishu MVP code-spec contracts for official SDK long connection, shared inbound service routing, chat-level conversation binding, /new rebinding, persistent inbound/outbound dedupe, non-text/self-message ignore behavior, outbound Agent-name prefixes, non-blocking bootstrap warm-up, and attempt-vs-ready long-connection logging.
Ensured future Feishu webhook, long-connection, event parsing, external event dedupe, and outbound delivery changes read the dedicated backend Feishu integration spec.
